'''Dethro Glok''' was an unscrupulous [[Dethro Glok's species|alien]] ruler of the scrap dealers who scavenge the abandoned mines and gas refineries of [[Ord Ibanna]]. He designed three of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] Podracing courses: [[Scrapper's Run/Legends|Scrapper's Run]], [[Dethro's Revenge/Legends|Dethro's Revenge]], and [[Abyss (Ord Ibanna)|Abyss]].<ref name="EIR" />
